items: Replaced the old Coming Soon page with a complete premium website in a dark design matched to the brand colours
Recreated the logo as a crisp vector graphic (SVG) that stays sharp at any size
Built the homepage: hero section, services overview, about section, newsletter and contact with map
Built 8 dedicated service pages: Servicing, Repairs, Diagnostics, Brakes & Clutches, Tyres & Alignment, Batteries & Electrics, Exhausts & Suspension and MOT Testing
Marked MOT Testing as Coming Soon across the whole site, with a notify-me signup collecting interested customers
Built the FAQ page with 18 questions and answers, structured for Google rich results
Styled the Google map in a dark theme matching the site design
Added animated statistics counters and a pulsing WhatsApp button
Mobile experience: hamburger menu and an always-visible bottom bar with Call Us + WhatsApp Us
Floating WhatsApp button on desktop, with editable pre-filled chat message
Branded, coloured social buttons (Facebook blue, Google colours), editable from the dashboard
Footer with FAQ link and centred contact details on mobile
Connected the newsletter signup to Brevo — every subscriber lands in your marketing list
Connected the contact form to email delivery (Resend) with anti-spam protection
Contact-form enquiries also saved automatically to a leads list in Brevo (mini-CRM)
Built the admin dashboard with passwordless sign-in — a login link arrives by email, no passwords to remember
Subscribers page: total subscribers and growth over the last 7 days
Site settings editable from the dashboard: WhatsApp number and message, social links, site address, tracking codes
Every setting change publishes itself to the live site automatically in about a minute
This Progress page: work log and upcoming tasks with live statuses
Monthly report emailed automatically on the 1st of each month: subscribers, enquiries, work done and what's coming next
Privacy-friendly visitor statistics with no cookies and no personal data — no Google Analytics needed
Statistics organised into clear sub-pages: Overview, Pages, Sources, Campaigns, Link & QR, History
Daily visits chart for the last 30 days, top pages and traffic sources
Visit history kept for 5 years, viewable separately per year
Campaign link generator with a step-by-step guide — measure exactly what each post or flyer brings
QR code generator with the DGS logo in the centre and print-quality download
Saved links and QR codes: reusable any time, with accidental-delete protection
Per-campaign statistics: daily, monthly and yearly charts for every saved link
Optional Google Analytics, Search Console and Bing integration fields with setup guides
Clean web addresses across the site (no .html endings)
Full search-engine package: social sharing previews, business details for Google (address, hours, phone), sitemap and robots rules
Branded image shown when the site is shared on WhatsApp, Facebook or other apps
Automatic publishing: every approved change goes live within a minute of being pushed
Security hardening: API keys stored safely out of the code, admin area protected and hidden from search engines
Dependabot safety net configured for automatic alerts on any future software updates

roadmap.title: Verify domain in Resend & Brevo for reliable email delivery
MOT bay launch announcement + newsletter campaign
Customer reviews section on the website
